title: M/Y Fjord 44 Open
description:
The 2019 Fjord 44 Open is a 13.5-metre Scandinavian performance open yacht extensively refitted in 2025, making it one of the most modern and well-equipped examples available on the European market.

Powered by brand-new Volvo Penta IPS 650 engines with just 50 hours, she delivers 33 to 40 knots with dynamic positioning, Garmin Fantom radar, autopilot, new Fischer Panda generator, Tecnicomar watermaker and air conditioning. She offers 2 comfortable staterooms and a crew berth, with premium Fusion audio, integrated cockpit fridges and a T-Top with electric bimini.

Located in Athens, VAT paid, turnkey and ready for sea. Contact Yacht Research to arrange a viewing.
